## Source: amazon-inspector (3868ddb111f719ba68b77cb727004735968c277712508099e138028047b7fd55)
The package nflx-release was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (0e2efa2f26d254c047bb2b44e083fe717ce4d0a35d4b895358f3eccc4c6f4020)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'nflx-release' @ 99.0.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
